stories.title: FSU's Comeback Complete — Seminoles Reach Regional Final vs. UCF After Saturday Sweep
stories.angle: FOLLOW UP (Stetson upset of FSU covered May 16). After being stunned by Stetson 8-3 on Friday, Florida State swept a Saturday doubleheader — run-ruling Jacksonville State 11-0 and defeating Stetson 11-3 — to reach Sunday's Tallahassee Regional Final vs. unbeaten UCF at noon. Brianna Danley had a career day in the Stetson rematch. FSU's redemption arc is one of the best stories of Regional Weekend.

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
FSU lost to Stetson Friday.

Saturday response: 11-0 over Jacksonville State. Then 11-3 over Stetson.

Two wins. One day. Brianna Danley with a career day.

No. 9 FSU is now in Sunday's regional final vs. UCF. 😤

#FSU #TallahasseeRegional #NCAAsoftball

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Day 1: Stetson 8, FSU 3.

Day 2: FSU 11, JSU 0. FSU 11, Stetson 3.

That is the most dominant one-day turnaround of Regional Weekend.

Sunday final: Florida State vs. UCF. Noon ET. 🥎

#CollegeSoftball #NCAAsoftball #WCWS2026

stories.title: LSU Shuts Out Virginia Tech 8-0 — Tigers Undefeated, One Win from Super Regionals
stories.angle: FOLLOW UP (VT Baton Rouge Regional covered May 16). LSU's Cece Cellura threw her first career complete-game shutout, run-ruling Virginia Tech 8-0 in Saturday's winners' bracket game. Maci Bergeron had 3 hits including a 2-run home run in the 2nd inning. LSU (No. 16 national seed) enters Sunday's Baton Rouge Regional Final undefeated and needs just one win to advance to the Super Regionals.

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Cece Cellura: career-first complete game shutout.

Maci Bergeron: 3 hits. 2-run HR in the 2nd.

LSU 8, Virginia Tech 0. Run rule. 6 innings.

The Tigers enter Sunday's Baton Rouge Regional Final UNDEFEATED. 🐯

#LSU #BatonRougeRegional #NCAAsoftball

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Virginia Tech was supposed to be the top upset pick at LSU's regional.

Cece Cellura says: not today.

LSU has now outscored opponents 16-0 through two games.

One win Sunday. That's all the Tigers need for the Super Regionals. 🔥

#LSU #NCAAsoftball #WCWS2026

stories.title: Saint Mary's Shocks Oregon 5-4 — Gaels Make Program History in Eugene
stories.angle: NEW STORY. Saint Mary's (CA) defeated No. 14 Oregon 5-4 in the Eugene Regional, marking the first postseason win in program history. The Gaels rallied from a 3-0 deficit, scoring four runs in the 4th inning. Elon Butler hit a leadoff HR for Oregon but it wasn't enough. Saint Mary's now faces Mississippi State in Sunday's regional final with a Super Regional berth on the line.

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Saint Mary's had NEVER won a postseason game.

Saturday in Eugene: they beat No. 14 Oregon 5-4.

Trailed 3-0. Scored 4 in the 4th. Never looked back.

Program history. Made on a Saturday afternoon. 🙌

#CollegeSoftball #NCAAsoftball #EugeneRegional

stories.title: Alabama Wins Tuscaloosa Regional — Briski Delivers, Tide Advance to Super Regionals
stories.angle: FOLLOW UP (Alabama covered May 13-17). Alabama won the Tuscaloosa Regional championship, advancing to the Super Regionals. Jocelyn Briski dominated Saturday's winners' bracket game against Belmont with a one-hit shutout (3-0 win). Alabama (No. 1 national seed) once again proved their regional dominance — extending the program's historically dominant tournament record.

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Jocelyn Briski: one-hit shutout Saturday.

Alabama wins the Tuscaloosa Regional.

The No. 1 seed. The SEC Pitcher of the Year. The moment when it mattered.

Super Regionals, here comes No. 1 Alabama. 💪

#Alabama #TuscaloosaRegional #NCAAsoftball

stories.title: Michigan and Grand Canyon Crash the Party — Two Cinderellas Reach Regional Finals
stories.angle: NEW STORY. Two bracket-buster stories headlined Saturday's elimination games. Michigan rallied through the loser's bracket — beating Binghamton 6-0, then knocking out Kansas 12-10 — to reach Sunday's Norman Regional Final vs. No. 3 Oklahoma. Grand Canyon topped South Dakota 5-4 in 8 innings on a Jada Cooper walk-off single to reach Sunday's Lincoln Regional Final vs. No. 4 Nebraska. Both face daunting top seeds on Sunday.

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Two loser's bracket stories for Regional Sunday:

🐾 GCU: Jada Cooper walk-off single (8th inn) — Lincoln Regional Final
🔵 Michigan: beat Kansas 12-10 after Binghamton — Norman Regional Final

Both face No. 1 seeds Sunday. 🔥

#NCAAsoftball #WCWS2026

stories.title: Regional Sunday Preview — Super Regionals Are Almost Set
stories.angle: NEW STORY. With 16 regional finals happening Sunday across the country, the field of 16 Super Regional participants will be set by tonight. Key championship games to watch: FSU vs. UCF (Tallahassee, noon ET), Oklahoma vs. Michigan (Norman, 3 PM CT), Nebraska vs. Grand Canyon (Lincoln, 3 PM CT), LSU vs. Virginia Tech (Baton Rouge, 1 PM CT). Super Regionals run May 21-24, with the WCWS at Devon Park in Oklahoma City opening May 28.

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
Regional Sunday. The field of 16 gets set TODAY.

🌞 FSU vs UCF — Tallahassee, Noon ET
🐯 LSU vs VT — Baton Rouge, 1 PM CT
🏈 Oklahoma vs Michigan — Norman, 3 PM CT
🌵 Nebraska vs GCU — Lincoln, 3 PM CT

Super Regionals: May 21. WCWS: May 28. 🥎

#NCAAsoftball #WCWS2026
